prompts.text: Character-led walk-and-talk through a neon-lit night market in the rain: handheld tracking at chest height, reflections on wet pavement, bilingual signage bokeh, moody cyan-magenta grade, natural gait, crowd depth layers.
prompts.author: @seed

prompts.text: Cinematic wide shot at golden hour: a lone cyclist crosses an empty coastal highway, warm rim light, subtle film grain, slow dolly-in, 35mm anamorphic feel, photoreal, shallow depth of field, gentle ocean haze.
prompts.author: @seed

prompts.text: Studio macro: molten glass being shaped by a blowtorch, extreme close-up, crisp specular highlights, dark backdrop, high-speed motion blur on sparks, HDR lighting, hyper-detailed textures.
prompts.author: @seed
